title: boryaceae
intro: The Boryaceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of flowering plants that are typically terrestrial and have a distinct set of characteristics. Boryaceae is a small family of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Members of this family are often recognized by their unique leaf shapes and flower structures. Boryaceae comprises a limited number of genera, with a total of about 15 species spread across the world.
